source: Synthetic — faithful approximation of the 2026-05-26 Gmail thread that triggered the AMBIGUOUS bug. Real thread is intentionally paraphrased (sender + body redacted) to avoid leaking inbox content into a committed repo file; date and time semantics preserved verbatim.

input.subject: Reminder: Piano Class tonight at 7:30 PM
input.bodyTruncated:
Hi Rebekah,

This is a friendly reminder that Madi has Piano Class tonight, Tuesday May 26, 2026 at 7:30 PM with Mr. Daniels at Step Up Music Academy.

Location: 1240 Oakland Ave, Clermont, FL 34711
Duration: 30 minutes

Please arrive 5 minutes early so we can start on time. If you need to cancel or reschedule, please reply to this email or call (352) 555-0142.

See you tonight!
Step Up Music Academy

notes: THE regression test for the 2026-05-26 Piano-vs-Math AMBIGUOUS incident. Under Phase 9 token-Dice the 7:30 PM Piano reminder false-matched the 4 PM 'Math Class' on the shared 'Class' token. Under Phase 11: candidate 7:30-8:00 PM time-overlaps the actual 'Music lessons' 7-8 PM block; arbiter reads 'Piano Class' vs 'Music lessons' and collapses them semantically -> SAME, matchedEventId=evt_music. The 4 PM Math Class is in the daySchedule but does NOT overlap the candidate interval, so the arbiter should never even see it as a candidate match. If verdict !== 'SAME' or matchedEventId !== 'evt_music', the regression has reoccurred.
